summary: Wealth.com's Ester Intelligence is a multi-agent AI system that synthesizes estate documents, tax returns, and balance sheets into auditable, advisor-ready outputs, processing over 100,000 estate documents and running 1,000+ deterministic calculations per distribution in 2025. AI-powered workflows on the platform grew 664% year over year as the company won approvals from the three largest US broker-dealers, unlocking access to 50,000+ advisors and firms managing over $15 trillion in client assets. Revenue has compounded at 3x annually for four consecutive years. The oversubscribed $65M Series B attracted Titanium Ventures, Pruven Capital, and Dynasty Financial Partners alongside existing backers Charles Schwab, GV, and Citi Ventures.
headline: Wealth.com's deterministic AI estate engine serves $15T in advisor assets, closes $65M Series B
the_so_what: With Dynasty Financial already embedding Ester into its advisor desktop and the three largest US broker-dealers now approved, Wealth.com is assembling the distribution footprint to displace fragmented legacy planning tools like Envestnet's MoneyGuide before incumbents ship comparable AI-native estate capabilities.

capability_evidence.metric: 100,000+ estate documents processed; 664% YoY AI workflow growth; $15T+ AUM served
capability_evidence.evidence: Ester Intelligence processed over 100,000 estate documents in 2025, executes 1,000+ deterministic calculations per estate distribution, and is now embedded in Dynasty Financial's advisor desktop.
